claim_text: Vertiv reported Q1 2026 net sales of $2.650 billion, up 30% from Q1 2025.
notes: Company earnings release furnished with SEC 8-K.

claim_text: Vertiv reported Q1 2026 organic sales growth of 23%.
Vertiv's Americas organic sales growth was 44.3% in Q1 2026, driven by strong data center demand.
notes: Americas is the strongest regional evidence for data-center demand.

claim_text: Vertiv reported Q1 2026 adjusted operating margin of 20.8%, up 430 basis points from Q1 2025.
notes: Margin expansion supports operating leverage thesis.

claim_text: Vertiv reported Q1 2026 operating cash flow of $767 million and adjusted free cash flow of $653 million.
notes: Strong cash conversion, but one-quarter working capital benefit should be monitored.

claim_text: Vertiv guided FY2026 net sales to $13.5-$14.0 billion, organic sales growth to 29-31%, adjusted operating margin to 22.8-23.8%, and adjusted diluted EPS to $6.30-$6.40.
notes: Formal company guidance; high growth and margin expectations are core to valuation.

claim_text: Vertiv management said data-center infrastructure requirements are evolving and customers are prioritizing optimized design, deployment speed and operational efficiency.
notes: Management explanation; needs customer and peer cross-check.

claim_text: Vertiv's risk disclosures include long sales cycles, unpredictable placing or cancelling of customer orders, and failure to realize sales expected from backlog of orders and contracts.
notes: Important backlog/order quality caution from company filing.

claim_text: Vertiv reported Q1 2026 Americas net sales of $1.814 billion and Americas operating profit of $490.2 million, up 53.1% and 88.8% year over year respectively.
Stooq showed VRT closing at $315.71 on 2026-05-29.
notes: Market quote source; refresh before live use.

claim_text: SEC companyfacts showed 384.108816 million VRT shares outstanding at April 20, 2026.
Using $315.71 per share and 384.108816 million shares, VRT's approximate equity market capitalization was $121.3 billion.
notes: Formula: 315.71 * 384.108816m. Does not include net debt or intraday price movement.

claim_text: Using $315.71 per share and FY2026 adjusted diluted EPS guidance midpoint of $6.35, VRT traded at approximately 49.7x FY2026 adjusted diluted EPS guidance.
notes: Formula: 315.71 / ((6.30+6.40)/2). This is not a consensus multiple.

claim_text: Using $315.71 per share and FY2026 GAAP diluted EPS guidance midpoint of $5.65, VRT traded at approximately 55.9x FY2026 GAAP diluted EPS guidance.
IEA Electricity 2024 highlighted data-center and AI electricity demand as a material source of electricity demand growth risk through 2026.
notes: Macro demand context; not company-specific validation.
